name: yzmir-dynamic-architectures
description: Dynamic/morphogenetic neural networks - grow, prune, adapt topology during training. Covers continual learning, gradient isolation, modern PEFT (LoRA, QLoRA, DoRA, VeRA, PiSSA, LoftQ, LoRA+, rsLoRA, LongLoRA), modular composition (post-Mixtral MoE, adapter merging via TIES/DARE/SLERP/MergeKit), lifecycle orchestration. 7 reference sheets, 2 commands, 1 SME agent.
